title: iberis balansae
intro: Iberis balansae, also known as Balansa's candytuft, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Iberis balansae include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and improve immune function. Iberis balansae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
